title: Blikable Chiltern Arts NEON Acrylic Paints-Set of 6 Colours,120 ml (Pack of 6),Yellow
features: Pack of 6 Different Neon Colour Set- 120mL - Neon Yellow. 120mL - Neon Pink.. 120mL - Neon Blue. 120mL - Neon Green. . 120mL- Neon Orange. 120mL - Neon Purple
Create a work of art that's as bright as you are with Metallic Acrylic Paint Set. Master's Touch metallic acrylic paints provide the highest quality of rich, vivid color.
Its heavy-bodied consistency makes it ideal for adding texture and achieving a wide range of fine art techniques
This paint works on a variety of surfaces and can be applied from the tube or with water for dilution.
This set of 6 boldly colored paints is perfect for beginners and professionals alike.
description: If you are looking to provide your kids with the best art and craft materials, these Children acrylic Neon Colour paints Set- 120mL - Neon Yellow. 120mL - Neon Pink.. 120mL - Neon Blue. 120mL - Neon Green. . 120mL- Neon Orange. 120mL - Neon Purple are the best choice for you. This pack of acrylic paints contains 6 tubes (120ml) of different metallic colors to make sure that your kids never run out of their favorite colors. The rich, vivid color and heavy consistency of these paints makes them best for beginners to achieve a wide range of fine arts techniques. These neon paints work on variety of surfaces and are the best creative art and craft set you can provide your kids with!
